## X-Sense Home Security v1.2.6.25

### 🎥 Camera WebRTC
- Sends camera SDP and ICE signal messages as raw APK-style envelopes.
- Starts live view from the APK data-channel trigger path.
- Tracks the first-frame timeout separately after live view starts.

### 🔎 Debug Logging
- Adds compact camera startup summaries with signal events, candidate counts, startLive state, and websocket close details.
